questions: Is the patient experiencing Postpartum Haemorrhage (PPH)? (Yes/No)
Is the PPH primary (within 24 hours) or secondary (24 hours to 6 weeks)?
What is the suspected or confirmed cause of the PPH (e.g., uterine atony, tears, retained placenta, inversion, rupture)?
Does the patient have bronchial asthma? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have heart disease? (Yes/No)
